title: Meeting the family
setting: Lucía has brought you home to meet her parents for the first time. Her mother opens the door.

steps.speaker: Doña Marta
steps.es: ¡Pase! Así que usted es el famoso novio.
steps.en: Come in! So you're the famous boyfriend.

options.es: Mucho gusto, doña. Le traje estas flores.
options.en: Nice to meet you, ma'am. I brought you these flowers.
options.feedback: Respectful 'doña' plus a thoughtful gift — a flawless first impression here.
Far too casual for meeting a partner's mother. Warmth and respect matter enormously.

options.en: The very one. Nice to meet you, ma'am.
options.feedback: Charming and polite — playing along with her warmth while staying respectful.

steps.speaker: Doña Marta
steps.es: Qué detalle. Pase, pase, la comida está lista.
steps.en: How thoughtful. Come in, come in, the food is ready.

options.en: It smells delicious. Thank you for having me.
options.feedback: Praising the food and thanking her for the welcome — exactly right. She'll glow.
She cooked to welcome you! Declining the meal would be a real misstep here.
Curiosity is fine, but lead with gratitude for the welcome first.

steps.speaker: Don Pedro
steps.es: Así que usted hace feliz a mi hija.
steps.en: So you're the one who makes my daughter happy.

options.es: Hago todo lo posible, don Pedro.
options.en: I do everything I can, Don Pedro.
options.feedback: Humble, sincere, and using his name respectfully. A father wants to hear exactly this.
Honest and modest — shows you take it seriously without overpromising.

options.es: Pues obvio, soy lo mejor que le pasó.
options.en: Well obviously, I'm the best thing that happened to her.
options.feedback: Cocky with her father?! That's a fast way to lose his respect. Stay humble.

steps.speaker: Doña Marta
steps.es: Espero que se sienta como en su casa, mijo.
steps.en: I hope you feel at home, dear.

options.es: Ya me siento así. Se lo agradezco mucho.
options.en: I already do. I appreciate it so much.
options.feedback: Warm, grateful, and it honors her kindness. She just called you 'mijo' — you're in.

options.en: Thank you, ma'am. You're all very kind.
options.feedback: Gracious and respectful — acknowledging the whole family's warmth is a lovely touch.
Cold and guarded when she's embracing you. Receive the warmth openly.
